title: Bridging Borders: Navigating Opportunities and Challenges for Overseas Vietnamese in Vietnam
metaDescription: An evening of discussion on the opportunities and challenges facing Overseas Vietnamese returning to live, work and do business in Vietnam.
about: Embark on a transformative journey with us at “Bridging Borders: Navigating Opportunities and Challenges for Overseas Vietnamese in Vietnam.” Are you an Overseas Vietnamese planning to relocate to Vietnam to make a career transition, explore business opportunities, or contribute to Vietnam's dynamic landscape? Join us for an evening of insightful discussions, inspiring stories, and meaningful connections.

matters.heading: Why Attend
body: In today's interconnected world, the opportunities for Overseas Vietnamese in Vietnam are boundless. Whether you're a seasoned entrepreneur, a budding professional, or simply curious about the evolving socio-economic landscape of Vietnam, this event is designed to empower you with the knowledge, insights, and networks you need to thrive.

agenda.title: Vietnam's Economic Journey: Looking Back at 2023 and Ahead to 2024
agenda.speaker: Jack Nguyen, CPA, CA – CEO, InCorp Vietnam

agenda.title: Sharing success stories of Overseas Vietnamese in Vietnam

agenda.title: Overseas Vietnamese Reintegration Roadmap: Breaking language barriers, bridging cultures and beyond

agenda.title: Panel Discussion
agenda.speaker: Quang Do (Founder, Overseas Vietnamese), Binh Tran (Co-Founder & General Partner, Ascend Vietnam Ventures) and AnHa (Annie) Vo (COO, Premier Dental)

registration.heading: RSVP Now
registration.subtitle: Register for our exclusive event and save your seat. Bridging Borders is your gateway to success in the land of endless opportunities.
